# dominikj111.github.io

Personal portfolio and blog by Dominik J., a Software Engineer.

## What this site is

A filterable content hub combining software projects, technical articles, and curated references in a single-page application. All content is browsable and searchable without an account.

## Content types

- **Projects** — software projects with descriptions, tech stack, and status
- **Articles** — technical blog posts (full text at /blog/{slug})
- **References** — curated external links and YouTube videos worth revisiting

## Key pages

- `/` — Portfolio SPA: filterable/searchable stream of all content, slide-in detail panel, featured items
- `/blog/{slug}` — Full blog article pages (MDX)
- `/rss.xml` — RSS feed of all blog posts
- `/sitemap-index.xml` — Full sitemap

## Navigation

The portfolio is a React island (`client:only`). For crawlers without JavaScript:
- A `<noscript>` block on the home page lists all content items as plain HTML
- Blog articles are fully server-rendered Astro pages
- All URLs are stable and shareable (`?f=`, `?q=`, `?focus=`, `?v=` params reflect active state)

## Signals

- Content is tagged — common tags include: rust, typescript, react, cli, open-source
- Items marked `pinned` are featured/highlighted work
- YouTube URLs in content items render an embedded player in the detail view

## Author

Dominik J. — Software Engineer
GitHub: https://github.com/dominikj111
